privacyPolicy.section1Intro: PikTag Inc. ("we", "us") collects the following information when you use our app:
privacyPolicy.section1Bullet1: • Account information: email, phone number, name, username, profile photo
privacyPolicy.section1Bullet2: • Profile data: bio, tags, social links, biolinks
privacyPolicy.section1Bullet3: • Contacts: with your permission, we access your device contacts to help you find friends on PikTag
privacyPolicy.section1Bullet4: • Location: with your permission, approximate location for nearby features
privacyPolicy.section1Bullet5: • Usage data: interactions, QR scans, tag activity
privacyPolicy.section2Bullet2: • Connect you with other users through tags and QR codes
privacyPolicy.section2Bullet3: • Send notifications about friend activity and reminders
privacyPolicy.section2Bullet4: • Generate AI-powered tag suggestions (using anonymized data)
privacyPolicy.section3Intro: We do NOT sell your personal information. We share data only:
privacyPolicy.section3Bullet1: • With other PikTag users according to your privacy settings (public/friends/close friends/private)
privacyPolicy.section3Bullet2: • With service providers (Supabase for database, Google for AI features)
privacyPolicy.section4Bullet1: • Each social link/contact has 4 visibility levels: Public, Friends, Close Friends, Only Me
privacyPolicy.section4Bullet2: • Tags can be set as public or private
privacyPolicy.section4Bullet3: • Hidden tags on connections are visible only to you
privacyPolicy.section4Bullet4: • You can block and report users at any time
privacyPolicy.section5Body: We retain your data while your account is active. You can deactivate or delete your account at any time from Settings. Upon deletion, we remove your data within 30 days.
privacyPolicy.section6Body: We use industry-standard encryption and security measures. Data is stored on Supabase (PostgreSQL) with Row Level Security policies.
privacyPolicy.section7Body: PikTag is not intended for users under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children.
privacyPolicy.section8Body: We may update this policy. We will notify you of significant changes through the app.

termsOfService.section1Body: By using PikTag, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the app.
termsOfService.section2Bullet1: • You must be at least 13 years old to use PikTag
termsOfService.section2Bullet2: • You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account
termsOfService.section2Bullet3: • One person, one account. Do not create fake or duplicate accounts
termsOfService.section2Bullet4: • You may deactivate or delete your account at any time
termsOfService.section3Bullet1: • You own the content you create (bio, tags, links, notes)
termsOfService.section3Bullet2: • You grant PikTag a license to display your public content to other users
termsOfService.section3Bullet3: • You must not post content that is illegal, harmful, or violates others' rights
termsOfService.section4Bullet1: • Harass, bully, or threaten other users
termsOfService.section4Bullet2: • Create fake profiles or impersonate others
termsOfService.section4Bullet3: • Use PikTag for spam, phishing, or fraud
termsOfService.section4Bullet4: • Scrape or collect user data without consent
termsOfService.section4Bullet5: • Attempt to reverse engineer or exploit the app
termsOfService.section5Bullet1: • QR codes you generate are associated with your account
termsOfService.section5Bullet2: • Hidden tags attached via QR code are private and visible only to you
termsOfService.section5Bullet3: • Batch tag modification may require a paid subscription in the future
termsOfService.section6Body: Some features (pinned tags, batch tag management) may require a paid subscription. Pricing will be announced separately.
termsOfService.section7Body: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may appeal by contacting support@pikt.ag.
termsOfService.section8Body: PikTag is provided "as is" without warranty. We are not responsible for user-generated content or interactions between users.
termsOfService.section9Body: PikTag Inc. shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
termsOfService.section10Body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of China (Taiwan).
termsOfService.section11Body: We review reports of objectionable content within 24 hours. When a report is substantiated, we may remove content, suspend accounts, or block users — at our discretion and consistent with these terms. Tap the ⋯ menu on any user, message, or post to file a report.
